prerequisites: A Mode account with access to the workspace whose data you want to extract.
The workspace (account) name, which is the required workspace config field. All API requests are scoped to this workspace.
Workspace administrator access to create a Workspace API token, or a Member API token if an Admin has enabled member keys (only Admins can create Workspace tokens).

authMethods.name: API token and secret (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: Mode authenticates over HTTP Basic auth using a token and secret pair. The api_token is the public component (the username) and the api_secret is the private component (the password). The secret is shown only once at creation, so save it immediately. The two values are combined as token:secret and Base64-encoded into the Authorization header.

setupSteps.title: Find your workspace name
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Mode and note your workspace (account) name. It is required for the workspace config field. All API requests are scoped to this workspace.

setupSteps.title: Create an API token and secret
setupSteps.body: An Admin creates a Workspace token under Workspace Settings > Features > API Keys > Workspace keys by clicking Create API Key and adding a display name. To create a Member token instead, an Admin first enables member keys under Workspace Settings > Features > API Keys > Member keys, then a member creates one under Workspace Settings > Personal > My API Keys.

setupSteps.title: Copy the token and secret
setupSteps.body: After creating the token, copy both the token (public, like a username) and the secret (private, like a password). The secret is displayed only once at creation, so store it securely before closing the modal. Mode tokens expire after 90 days by default.

setupSteps.title: Provide the credentials and workspace
setupSteps.body: Enter the token value into the api_token field, the secret value into the api_secret field, and your workspace (account) name into the workspace field. The connector uses these to authenticate via HTTP Basic auth against your workspace.
